text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oof, that's scabbed up real bad... It's so thick,
too.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I think I was supposed to visit Grandmother next
week... Or was it this week?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: What if it isn't healed up by then?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I guess I should wear gloves when I go. Here's to
hoping she won't find out...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer seems very concerned about her
skin.
